summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 40 listed candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined individually. Items whose live state was unavailable from the preflight artifact are downgraded to item-scoped needs_human because target_updated_at could not be safely hydrated under the job rule that gitcrawl snapshot timestamps must not be used.
